title: Christmas Nostalgia
description: Enjoy a Cozy Christmas Modpack! A comfortable survival experience in a festive atmosphere.
body:
## Archived
- Please note this Modpack has been archived, this means it is no longer actively maintained. Although the files are still likely to work, they will not be updated.

![Christmas Nostalgia Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa16956eddb6b55947c3e2cb1aefe74ab89013de.png)
![Christmas Nostalgia SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6ZdzMmIM/images/8adf92619d85d8c63753028b91ee1f09070b64da.png)
# Overview

**Christmas Nostalgia** is a cozy christmas themed Modpack. Enjoy a white world filled with snow, with small comforts such as sleeping bags, sleds and mobs wearing santa hats! With a optimised Modpack, enjoy traveling around with some snowy companions running shaders or set down roots with a festive home, while enjoying a few secrets along the way.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/christmas-nostalgia)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/christmas-nostalgia)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **Snowy Wonderland** - It's a white world, snow wherever you look!
- [✔️] **Festive Mobs** - Time to get into that festive spirit, the mobs want to join you to!
- [✔️] **Christmas Delights** - Enjoy a variety of new christmas blocks and decorations, from candy canes to decorative lights.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems, shaders too!
## Screenshots - Check Gallery for more!

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
